description_long: This is a large, L-shaped urban cabinet or shelving unit, primarily finished in white with a wooden accent on the central back panel and bench. The left side features a tall, open shelving column with six angled shelves, ideal for storing books, shoes, or small items. Above the wooden slatted backrest, there are three open cubby compartments for additional storage or display. The right section is a solid, blocky structure, likely containing enclosed storage or closet space, with no visible handles or doors from the exterior. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for use in public spaces such as lobbies, waiting areas, or entryways. The materials and construction suggest durability and a focus on both utility and aesthetics.
description: A modern, L-shaped white cabinet with open shelving, a wooden slatted backrest, and upper cubby compartments, designed for urban public or semi-public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing open angled shelves on the left, a wooden slatted backrest with a bench, and upper cubby compartments.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelving unit and the solid, blocky right section with no visible openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid white back with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid, featureless side of the right section and the depth of the unit.
